task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, showing the workspace with a sidebar on the left and a chat area on the right.

task_completion.description: Verify that the '#release-updates' channel is marked as a Favorite.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Favorites' category header in the left sidebar that contains the '#release-updates' channel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the '#general' channel is hidden from the sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the entire left sidebar to ensure the '#general' channel is completely absent.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sidebar is configured to group channels by type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct category headers like 'Channels' and 'Direct Messages' in the sidebar, or check if the 'Group by Type' toggle is enabled in the Display/Sidebar settings menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sidebar is configured to sort channels by name (alphabetically).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check that the channels listed under a category (e.g., 'Channels') are ordered alphabetically, or verify that the 'Alphabetical' option is selected under 'Sort By' in the Sidebar settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sidebar is using the condensed view mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Observe the vertical spacing between channels in the sidebar; it should be tight with minimal padding (condensed), or verify that the 'Condensed' option is selected under 'View Mode' in the Sidebar settings.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the genuine Rocket.Chat web interface or desktop app, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Settings menus, context menus, or sidebar interactions should be visible in the trajectory, rather than terminal windows executing API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that browser developer tools were not used to fake the visual outcome.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open and modifying the DOM to artificially hide channels or change the sidebar appearance.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target configurations: 1. '#release-updates' must be favorited. 2. '#general' must be hidden. 3. Sidebar preferences: Sort by 'alphabetical', Group by Type enabled, View Mode set to 'condensed'.
